properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a hill I cherish Where stood a precious tree The emblem of Salvation The gift of Calvary

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How is it I should profit? While He is crucified Yet as His life was taken So I was granted mine

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My wealth is in the cross There's nothing more I want Than just to know His love My heart is set on Christ And I will count all else as loss The greatest of my crowns Mean nothing to me now For I counted up the cost And all my wealth is in the cross

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will not boast in riches I have no pride in gold But I will boast in Jesus And in His Name alone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My wealth is in the cross There's nothing more I want Than just to know His love My heart is set on Christ And I will count all else as loss The greatest of my crowns Mean nothing to me now For I counted up the cost And all my wealth is in the cross Yes all my wealth is in the cross

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And when I stand in glory My crowns before the Lord Let this be my confession My wealth is in the cross

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: My wealth is in the cross There's nothing more I want Than just to know His love My heart is set on Christ And I will count all else as loss The greatest of my crowns Mean nothing to me now For I counted up the cost

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And all my wealth is in the cross There's nothing more I want Than just to know His love My heart is set on Christ And I will count all else as loss The greatest of my crowns Mean nothing to me now For I counted up the cost And all my wealth is in the cross

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Yes all my wealth is in the cross My wealth is in the cross Yes all my wealth is in the cross
